title: 91% Hubble Tension Concordance — N/U Algebra + UHA Coordinate Encoding
description: Primary published result for N/U Algebra + Observer Tensor Hubble tension resolution. 91% tension reduction (5.40 → 0.48 km/s/Mpc) using 6 independent H₀ probes. v1.2.0 adds UHA ξ encoding demonstration and CLARIFICATION.md restoring Universal Horizon Address references post patent filing (US 63/902,536). Includes anchor catalog with ξ values for 52 NGC 4258 HII objects.
notes: Patent US 63/902,536 filed 2025-10-21. UHA references were obfuscated in v1.0.0-v1.0.1 for IP protection. v1.2.0 restores full UHA context via CLARIFICATION.md and uha_xi_encoding.py.
